summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five hydrated open PR inventory candidates. No merge actions are recommended because none has a complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof; no fix artifact is emitted because the hydrated evidence does not identify a bounded executable repair for the cluster.

actions.reason: Keep as an independent maintainer-ready PR; do not recommend merge without complete merge_preflight, and no bounded repair artifact is justified from the hydrated evidence.
